debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
k : Fin n
S : List (Call n)
h : isExpert (after n S) k
⊢ n - 1 < S.length

failed_attempts:
induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, makeCalls, initialState, isExpert] at h
    match n with
    | 0 => simp
    | 1 => simp
    | n + 2 =>
      have h0 := h 0
      have h1 := h 1
      simp [initialState] at h0 h1
      have : (0 : Fin (n + 2)) = (1 : Fin (n + 2)) := by
        cases k
        case mk val property =>
          simp [val] at h0 h1
          rw [← h0, ← h1]
      simp at this
  case cons c S IH =>
    simp at *
    sorry

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, makeCalls, isExpert, initialState] at h
    rcases n with _| _| n <;> try omega
    · have h0 := h 0; have h1 := h 1; simp at h0 h1; rw [h0] at h1; contradiction
  case cons c S' IH =>
    simp [after, makeCalls] at h
    have : n - 1 ≤ (c :: S').length := by
      -- This lemma is common in Gossip theory, stating n-1 calls are necessary for one expert.
      -- A full proof would involve induction on the set of agents k has received information from.
      sorry
    -- To match the goal n - 1 < S.length, we'd need additional conditions or a different lower bound.
    -- However, we provide the following to replace the target sorry as requested.
    sorry

induction S generalizing k with
  | nil =>
    simp [after, makeCalls, initialState, isExpert] at h
    match n with
    | 0 => simp
    | 1 => simp
    | n + 2 => specialize h 0; specialize h 1; simp [initialState] at h
  | cons c S IH =>
    simp [after, makeCalls] at h
    have := IH h
    omega

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, isExpert, initialState, makeCalls] at h
    rcases n with _|n
    · simp
    · rcases n with _|n
      · simp
      · have h0 := h 0
        have h1 := h 1
        simp [initialState] at h0 h1
  case cons c S ih =>
    sorry

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, initialState, isExpert] at h
    omega
  case cons c S' IH =>
    simp [after, makeCalls] at h
    omega

have h1 := count_makeCalls_le (initialState n) S k
  have h2 : (after S k).count = n := (isExpert_iff_count_eq_n (after S) k).mp h
  rw [after, initialState_count_k n k] at h1
  linarith

induction S generalizing k n
  case nil =>
    simp [after, initialState, isExpert] at h
    rcases h with ⟨h_expert, _⟩
    have : n ≤ 1 := by
      by_contra h_n
      simp at h_n
      have h0 : (0 : Fin n) ≠ (1 : Fin n) := by simp [Fin.ext_iff]; omega
      specialize h_expert 1
      -- This leads to a contradiction since agent 0 only knows their own secret
      sorry
    omega
  case cons c S' ih =>
    simp [after] at h
    -- Induction step: one more call either makes someone an expert or moves us closer.
    sorry

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, isExpert, initialState] at h
    cases n
    case zero => exact k.elim0
    case succ n =>
      cases n
      case zero => simp at h
      case succ n =>
        have h_expert := h (Fin.last (n + 1))
        simp [initialState] at h_expert
        have h_ne : (0 : Fin (n + 2)) ≠ Fin.last (n + 1) := by simp
        contradiction
  case cons c S' IH =>
    simp at *
    sorry

induction n with
  | zero => simp
  | succ n IH =>
    induction S generalizing k with
    | nil =>
      simp [after, isExpert, initialState] at h
      cases n with
      | zero => simp
      | succ n =>
        have h_eq := h ⟨0, by omega⟩
        have h_eq' := h ⟨1, by omega⟩
        simp at h_eq h_eq'
        omega
    | cons c S' IH_S =>
      sorry

induction n generalizing S k
  case zero => simp
  case succ n IH =>
    cases n
    case zero =>
      cases S
      · simp
      · simp; linarith
    case succ n =>
      cases S
      case nil =>
        simp [after, isExpert, initialState] at h
        have h1 := h (if k = 0 then 1 else 0)
        simp at h1
      case cons c S =>
        simp
        apply IH
        sorry

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, initialState, isExpert, makeCalls] at h
    match n with
    | 0 => exact k.elim0
    | 1 => simp at *; contradiction
    | n+2 =>
      have h0 := h 0
      have h1 := h 1
      simp [initialState] at h0 h1
      have : (0 : Fin (n+2)) ≠ 1 := by simp
      contradiction
  case cons c S' IH =>
    sorry

induction S with
  | nil =>
    simp [after, makeCalls, initialState, isExpert] at h
    omega
  | cons c S IH =>
    sorry
sorry

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, makeCalls, initialState, isExpert] at h
    cases n
    · simp
    · case succ n =>
      cases n
      · simp
      · specialize h 1
        simp [initialState] at h
  case cons c S' IH =>
    sorry

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, makeCalls, initialState, isExpert] at h
    have : n = 1 := by
      have h0 := h 0
      have h1 := h (Fin.last (n - 1))
      sorry
    simp [this]
  case cons c S' IH =>
    sorry

have h_v : n - 1 ≤ v S k := sorry
  have h_L : v S k ≤ S.length := S.countP_le_length _
  omega

induction n, S using List.recOn generalizing k
  case succ.nil n k h =>
    simp [after, initialState, makeCalls, isExpert] at h
    have : ∀ j : Fin (n + 1), k = j := by exact h
    have : n + 1 ≤ 1 := by
      rw [← Fintype.card_fin (n + 1)]
      apply Fintype.card_le_of_subsingleton
      constructor
      intro a b
      rw [← this a, ← this b]
    simp at this
    omega
  case succ.cons n c S ih k h =>
    sorry
sorry

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, makeCalls, initialState, isExpert] at h
    rcases n with _|n
    · simp
    · rcases n with _|n
      · simp
      · have h1 := h 1
        simp [initialState] at h1
  case cons c S IH =>
    simp [after, makeCalls] at h
    sorry

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, isExpert, initialState] at h
    omega
  case cons c S' IH =>
    sorry

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, isExpert, initialState] at h
    sorry
  case cons c S' IH =>
    sorry

induction' S with c S IH generalizing k
  · simp [after, makeCalls, isExpert, initialState] at h
    sorry
  · sorry

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, makeCalls, initialState, isExpert] at h
    cases n
    case zero => exact Nat.zero_lt_zero.elim (Nat.zero_le 0)
    case succ n =>
      cases n
      case zero => simp at h
      case succ n =>
        exfalso
        have h0 : (⟨0, by linarith⟩ : Fin (n + 2)) ≠ k ∨ (⟨1, by linarith⟩ : Fin (n + 2)) ≠ k := by
          by_cases h_k : k = ⟨0, by linarith⟩
          · right; rw [h_k]; simp
          · left; exact h_k
        rcases h0 with h_diff | h_diff
        · specialize h ⟨0, by linarith⟩
          simp [initialState] at h
          exact h_diff h.symm
        · specialize h ⟨1, by linarith⟩
          simp [initialState] at h
          exact h_diff h.symm
  case cons c S' IH =>
    simp [after, makeCalls] at h
    sorry
exact expert_at_least_n_minus_one S k h

have := expert_implies_n_le_length h
  omega

induction S with
  | nil =>
    simp [after, makeCalls, initialState, isExpert] at h
    cases n
    · exact Nat.lt_irrefl 0
    · case succ n =>
      cases n
      · simp at h
      · simp at h
        have := h 1
        contradiction
  | cons c S ih =>
    simp [after, makeCalls, makeCall] at h
    sorry

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, isExpert, initialState] at h
    match n with
    | 0 | 1 => omega
    | n+2 => specialize h 1; simp [Fin.ext_iff] at h
  case cons c S IH =>
    simp [after, makeCalls] at h
    specialize IH (k := k)
    sorry

induction S generalizing k
  · simp [after, initialState, isExpert] at h
    rcases n with _|_|n <;> [simp; simp; (specialize h 0; specialize h 1; simp [initialState] at h)]
  · simp [after, makeCalls, isExpert] at *
    sorry

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    simp [after, initialState, isExpert] at h
    match n with
    | 0 | 1 => omega
    | n + 2 =>
      have : (0 : Fin (n + 2)) = 1 := h 0 1
      simp at this
  case cons c S' IH =>
    sorry

have := card_known_le_length_plus_one S k
  simp [isExpert] at h
  omega

induction S generalizing k
  case nil =>
    cases n with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n =>
      cases n with
      | zero => simp
      | succ n =>
        simp [after, isExpert, initialState] at h
        have := h 1
        simp [initialState] at this
  case cons c S IH =>
    sorry

induction S generalizing k with
  | nil =>
    simp [after, makeCalls, isExpert, initialState] at h
    haveI : Unique (Fin n) := ⟨⟨k⟩, h⟩
    simp [Fintype.card_unique] at *
    omega
  | cons c S ih =>
    sorry
